formatted_full_schema:
The following schema from the pgim_property_finance database outlines the table names and their respective columns. Each column is detailed in this order: column_name, is_PrimaryKey, data_type, column_description, value_description, and value_example. 


Table: dim_property
property_key,Primary Key,TEXT,Property key,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: PROP00001, PROP00002, PROP00003.","['PROP00001', 'PROP00002', 'PROP00003']"
property_code,,TEXT,Property code,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: P-2021-00001, P-2022-00002, P-2023-00003.","['P-2021-00001', 'P-2022-00002', 'P-2023-00003']"
property_name,,TEXT,Property name,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Horizon Towers, Oakridge Towers, Cedar Point.","['Horizon Towers', 'Oakridge Towers', 'Cedar Point']"
property_type,,TEXT,Property type,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Data Center, Office, Office.","['Data Center', 'Office', 'Multifamily']"
property_subtype,,TEXT,Property subtype,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Colocation, Suburban Office, Medical Office.","['Colocation', 'Suburban Office', 'Medical Office']"
property_class,,TEXT,Property class,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: A, A, B.","['A', 'B', 'C']"
investment_status,,TEXT,Investment status,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Operating, Held for Sale, Operating.","['Operating', 'Held for Sale', 'Development']"
fund_key,,TEXT,Fund key,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: FUND0002, FUND0006, FUND0004.","['FUND0002', 'FUND0006', 'FUND0004']"
manager_key,,TEXT,Manager key,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: AM002, AM005, AM001.","['AM002', 'AM005', 'AM001']"
owner_entity_name,,TEXT,Owner entity name,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: PGIM Core Plus Fund, PGIM Core Plus Fund, PGIM Value Partners.","['PGIM Core Plus Fund', 'PGIM Value Partners', 'PGIM Opportunity Fund']"
location_key,,TEXT,Location key,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: LOC00001, LOC00002, LOC00003.","['LOC00001', 'LOC00002', 'LOC00003']"
city,,TEXT,City,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Newark, Newark, Miami.","['Newark', 'Miami', 'Austin']"
micro_market,,TEXT,Micro market,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Northern NJ, Northern NJ, South Florida.","['Northern NJ', 'South Florida', 'Austin Metro']"
acquisition_date,,TEXT,Acquisition date,"Calendar date stored as ISO-8601 text. Example values: 42472, 42749, 45169.","['42472', '42749', '45169']"
stabilization_date,,TEXT,Stabilization date,"Calendar date stored as ISO-8601 text. Example values: 43871, 43256, 46355.","['43871', '43256', '46355']"
year_built,,INTEGER,Year built,"Whole number measure or count. Example values: 1997, 2004, 2021.","[1997, 2004, 2021]"
last_renovated_year,,INTEGER,Last renovated year,Whole number measure or count. Example values: 2007.,"[None, 2007, 2025]"
gross_building_area_sqft,,INTEGER,Gross building area square feet,"Whole number measure or count. Example values: 1624492, 1346105, 1609089.","[1624492, 1346105, 1609089]"
net_leasable_area_sqft,,INTEGER,Net leasable area square feet,"Whole number measure or count. Example values: 1295409, 1110494, 1322056.","[1295409, 1110494, 1322056]"
land_area_acres,,REAL,Land area acres,"Numeric measure that may include decimals. Example values: 70.67, 5.28, 44.56.","[70.67, 5.28, 44.56]"
total_units,,INTEGER,Total units,Whole number measure or count.,"[None, 1119, 222]"
total_parking_bays,,INTEGER,Total parking bays,"Whole number measure or count. Example values: 158, 237, 1146.","[158, 237, 1146]"
occupancy_stabilized_flag,,TEXT,Occupancy stabilized flag,"Binary-style indicator such as Y or N. Example values: Y, Y, Y.","['Y', 'N']"
green_certification,,TEXT,Green certification,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: None, ENERGY STAR, LEED Silver.","['None', 'ENERGY STAR', 'LEED Silver']"
energy_rating,,TEXT,Energy rating,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: B, A+, C.","['B', 'A+', 'C']"
capex_plan_flag,,TEXT,Capex plan flag,"Binary-style indicator such as Y or N. Example values: Y, Y, N.","['Y', 'N']"
capex_budget_cr,,REAL,Capex budget cr,"Numeric measure that may include decimals. Example values: 56.15, 108.31, 26.58.","[56.15, 108.31, 26.58]"
debt_financed_flag,,TEXT,Debt financed flag,"Binary-style indicator such as Y or N. Example values: N, N, N.","['N', 'Y']"
loan_account_masked,,TEXT,Loan account masked,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: XXXX-1106, XXXX-5554, XXXX-7482.","['XXXX-1106', 'XXXX-5554', 'XXXX-7482']"
property_manager,,TEXT,Property manager,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Cushman PM, CBRE PM, CBRE PM.","['Cushman PM', 'CBRE PM', 'JLL PM']"
asset_manager,,TEXT,Asset manager,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Summit AM, Northstar AM, Apex AM.","['Summit AM', 'Northstar AM', 'Apex AM']"
risk_grade,,TEXT,Risk grade,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Medium, Low, Medium.","['Medium', 'Low', 'High']"
hold_sell_recommendation,,TEXT,Hold sell recommendation,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Sell, Sell, Refinance.","['Sell', 'Refinance', 'Hold']"
exit_target_year,,INTEGER,Exit target year,"Whole number measure or count. Example values: 2029, 2032, 2030.","[2029, 2032, 2030]"
source_system,,TEXT,Source system,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Juniper Square, Juniper Square, Custodian Feed.","['Juniper Square', 'Custodian Feed', 'Fund Admin']"
source_record_id,,TEXT,Source record id,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: PROP-SRC-000001, PROP-SRC-000002, PROP-SRC-000003.","['PROP-SRC-000001', 'PROP-SRC-000002', 'PROP-SRC-000003']"
source_document_uri,,TEXT,Source document uri,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: synthetic://property/master, synthetic://property/master, synthetic://property/master.",['synthetic://property/master']
citation_id,,TEXT,Citation id,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: CIT-PROP-000001, CIT-PROP-000002, CIT-PROP-000003.","['CIT-PROP-000001', 'CIT-PROP-000002', 'CIT-PROP-000003']"
trace_event_id,,TEXT,Trace event id,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: TRACE-PROP-000001, TRACE-PROP-000002, TRACE-PROP-000003.","['TRACE-PROP-000001', 'TRACE-PROP-000002', 'TRACE-PROP-000003']"
ingestion_batch_id,,TEXT,Ingestion batch id,"Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: BATCH-PROP-202605-25, BATCH-PROP-202605-22, BATCH-PROP-202605-18.","['BATCH-PROP-202605-25', 'BATCH-PROP-202605-22', 'BATCH-PROP-202605-18']"

valuation_change_percent_yoy.value_description: Numeric measure that may include decimals. Example values: 0.0455, 0.0186, 0.0026.

ltv_percent.value_description: Numeric measure that may include decimals. Example values: 0.4957, 0.3538, 0.4021.

dscr_x.value_description: Numeric measure that may include decimals. Example values: 1.27, 1.59, 1.82.

appraiser_name.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: EstateMark Consultants, Knight Advisory, Knight Advisory.

valuation_committee_status.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Approved, Approved, Under Review.

valuation_approval_date.value_description: Calendar date stored as ISO-8601 text. Example values: 45766, 45882, 45976.

variance_reason.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Occupancy movement, Cap rate movement, Cap rate movement.

sensitivity_low_value_cr.value_description: Numeric measure that may include decimals. Example values: 577.75, 779.98, 718.7.

sensitivity_high_value_cr.value_description: Numeric measure that may include decimals. Example values: 678.23, 915.62, 843.7.

source_system.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: Valuation, Valuation, Valuation.

source_record_id.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: VAL-SRC-00001-01, VAL-SRC-00001-02, VAL-SRC-00001-03.

source_document_uri.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: synthetic://valuation/report, synthetic://valuation/report, synthetic://valuation/report.

citation_id.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: CIT-VAL-00001-01, CIT-VAL-00001-02, CIT-VAL-00001-03.

trace_event_id.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: TRACE-VAL-00001-01, TRACE-VAL-00001-02, TRACE-VAL-00001-03.

ingestion_batch_id.value_description: Categorical or identifier text value. Example values: BATCH-VAL-202503, BATCH-VAL-202506, BATCH-VAL-202509.
